features.name: nested generate blocks without explicit names causing implicit genblk hierarchy
features.description: Code should include nested generate blocks without explicit names where Verilator's implicit genblk naming creates extra hierarchy levels in the hierarchical path
features.snippet:
genvar i, j;
generate
  for (i = 0; i < 2; i++) begin
    for (j = 0; j < 2; j++) begin
      wire [7:0] data = mem[i];
    end
  end
endgenerate

features.name: hierarchical reference to memory through nested generates
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical path reference to a memory array that passes through nested generate blocks without explicit names
features.snippet:
logic [7:0] mem [0:255];
generate
  for (genvar i = 0; i < 2; i++) begin : g1
    for (genvar j = 0; j < 2; j++) begin : g2
      wire [7:0] w = mem[0];
    end
  end
endgenerate
